name: <OnSomeIpMethodError>
title: <OnSomeIpMethodError>
description: A callback function with this signature must be passed to the CAPL function SomeIpCreateMethodCall.

parameters.name: methodCallHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that triggered the callback, see SomeIpAddMethod.

parameters.name: messageErrorHandle
parameters.description: Message handle of the SOME/IP error message.

description: In this example, it is assumed that the created method is contained in the FIBEX database that is assigned to the CANoe configuration. The method has the Method ID 31, two input parameters (Member_value1 and Member_value2), and a return parameter (Result).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
